title: Fusion Connected Planks
description: Adds a connected frame texture to all wood planks
body:
This Resource Pack adds new connected textures and models for all wood planks to make these more interesting on building while still looking vanilla.

# Compatibility
- Vanilla Minecraft:
  - Oak, spruce, birch, jungle, dark oak, acacia, mangrove, cherry, pale oak, crimson and warped planks.
- (Working on more)
